errata.achieved_target_ext_form: target("dx.Texture", float, IsWriteable, 0, 0, 2) (upstream), NOT the abandoned self-invented dx.Texture2D<float>/dx.RWTexture2D<float>
errata.store_intrinsic: llvm.dx.resource.store.texture (local llc patch H:/llvm-clean-82c5bce5-src commit 2afad69a7, issue #194930, registry/deferred.json RD-025) -> dx.op.textureStore(67)
errata.reason: Not all four revert conditions are true (condition 2 unmet: single-level kernel, math parity + D3D12 dispatch pending). Fail-closed preserved. See texture_intrinsic_toolchain_blocker.json resolution.

reverification_2026_07_12.context: Recompute pass re-ran the revert conditions before attempting the hlsl_bridge_workaround -> rurix_owned switch. Pure offline (rurixc -> llc -> dxv), outputs to an out-of-repo scratch dir; no canonical artifact / pass_manifest / src file overwritten.
reverification_2026_07_12.condition_1_recheck: SATISFIED — lib_texture.rx and lib.rx both compile exit-0 and DXV-accept on every run.

new_blocker_llc_dxil_nondeterminism.measured: Byte-identical input IR (.ll stable x10, b7cd1539...) fed to llc yields TWO distinct DXIL containers at random (llc-direct on fixed .ll x12 -> 2 hashes 8:4; same two states via rurixc). Differ in 3 bytes of bitcode (offset ~516) + the 16-byte downstream module hash.
new_blocker_llc_dxil_nondeterminism.consequence: A digest-pinned canonical (src include_bytes! + LUMINANCE_OFFLINE_DXIL_SHA256) cannot be satisfied — no single reproducible SHA-256. Independently fails the switch's reproducibility bar, on top of still-unmet conditions 2-4. The DXC hlsl_bridge canonical IS deterministic and stays pin-able.
new_blocker_llc_dxil_nondeterminism.prior_evidence_gap: The earlier 'byte-stable x8' claim (texture_intrinsic_toolchain_blocker.json resolution.evidence) was measured on minimal probe cases (case_K.ll/case_L.ll), not the full luminance kernel container. The single-shot pass_direct_compile_evidence.json recorded only one of the two lib.rx states (966f10a0...).

reverification_2026_07_12.reason: New reproducibility blocker (llc DXIL non-determinism) + still-unmet conditions 2-4. Fail-closed preserved; canonical artifacts, pass_manifest, src digests, and registry/deferred.json unchanged by this slice.
